name: XPeng Inc.
description: XPeng Inc. is a leading Chinese Smart Electric Vehicle company that designs, develops, manufactures, and markets smart EVs that appeal to the large and growing base of technology-savvy middle-class consumers. Its mission is to drive Smart EV transformation with technology, shaping the mobility experience of the future. To optimize its customers' mobility experience, XPeng develops in-house its full-stack advanced driver-assistance system technology and in-car intelligent operating system, as well as core vehicle systems including powertrain and the electrical/electronic architecture.

investment_theses.company_type: Chinese Electric Vehicle Manufacturer / Smart EV Technology
